### Instruction

List public biological databases that contain ATAC-seq data from human Type 2 Diabetes (T2D) samples.

### Constraints

* Include only databases/repositories (NOT individual datasets)
* Only ATAC-seq (exclude RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, etc.)
* Must be publicly accessible
* Focus on human data only

### Output Format

| Database Name | URL | Description | Evidence of T2D relevance |
Include only databases/repositories; Only ATAC-seq; Publicly accessible; Human data.
